rounds: Purple Country Road bag to the food shop — self-talk caught mid-air, 'this is silly' flipped to 'because I want to', and he did it anyway. That round goes to Matt, hard. Apollo ring and necklace at work though? Joy police took that one clean — pool nerves, ring size, pendant reading as 'obviously gay' — which, yes, that's the whole point, but they won that round. Pink jockstrap to Balmoral Friday is a hold: poncho still on, but the choice was made in the men's change room and that counts.
pattern: They're loud at work and quiet with strangers — his people and his professional world are where they're still running the room.
